message:
feat(static-semantics): add eval/arguments binding, for-in/for-of scope, destructuring duplicate, and arrow block body analysis

Major hardening of the static analysis pass with three new StaticErrorKind
variants and substantial scope-creation improvements:

- EvalArgumentsBinding: flag eval/arguments as binding names in strict mode
  per ES2020 12.1.1
- ForInInitializer: catch for (var x = 1 in ...) in strict mode
- DuplicateDestructuringBinding: catch let { a, a } = obj and ([x, x]) =>
- Export specifier extraction: parse { a, b as c } clauses for per-specifier
  duplicate validation instead of whole-clause comparison
- for-in/for-of: allocate proper child ScopeNode, register let/const
  bindings, validate reserved-word bindings and destructuring duplicates
- Arrow function block bodies: create proper function scope context
  (save/restore in_function, in_loop, in_switch, const_bindings) for
  correct return/break/continue/const-assignment detection; check arrow
  params for duplicate names in module mode
- ~40 new unit tests covering all of the above
- Update 7 golden fixture hashes to reflect AST structure changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
